scope.research_question: Can the Martin and Graulich (2024) full text be retrieved and used to resolve the open numeric/method extraction follow-up?

summary: Full-text/numeric extraction was attempted but not completed. ScienceDirect and DOI/DOAJ pages exposed abstract/open-access metadata only; ScienceDirect direct PDF and browser paths returned CAPTCHA/IP-block pages; Elsevier text-mining links returned metadata or required an API key; Unpaywall, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, and CORE exposed no PDF or article-body URL. Martin/Graulich remains abstract-bounded and excluded from numeric or method-specific synthesis.
next_actions: Obtain the publisher PDF through user-provided upload, institutional access, or another primary full-text route, then extract methods and results tables.
Keep Martin/Graulich in the qualitative map only until source-backed numeric and method details are extracted.
